message:
feat(session): add V2 lazy hydration mode selection for large session resume

Introduces configurable hydration strategy when resuming sessions from
V2 stores, avoiding full materialization of large sessions. Adds three
new internal functions:

- parse_v2_open_mode: parses "full", "active"/"active_path", "tail",
  and "tail:N" mode strings from environment variables
- resolve_v2_lazy_hydration_threshold: reads configurable threshold
  (default 10,000 entries) above which lazy hydration activates
- select_v2_open_mode_for_resume: combines entry count, mode override,
  and threshold to select the optimal V2OpenMode with a reason string

Environment variables:
- PI_SESSION_V2_OPEN_MODE: force a specific mode (full/active/tail:N)
- PI_SESSION_V2_LAZY_THRESHOLD: entry count threshold for auto lazy mode

When a session exceeds the lazy threshold and no explicit mode is set,
ActivePath mode is automatically selected, hydrating only the active
branch rather than the full entry tree. Falls back to Full mode when
ActivePath is requested but the store has no head entry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
